summary: A case management web app with a Dashboard and Cases page. Dashboard cards should navigate to the corresponding case and display owner name and presenting complaint.
architectural_notes: Dashboard cards link to Cases page; navigation must pass case identifier to scroll/highlight the correct case
known_issues: Clicking a Dashboard card does not navigate to the corresponding case on the Cases page

existing_features.title: Fix the click handler on CalendarCaseCard so that clicking a card on the Dashboard correctly sets the targetCaseId state in App.tsx and navigates the user to the Cases page, scrolling to and highlighting the corresponding case card.
Display the owner name and presenting complaint (from the VetCase data) on each CalendarCaseCard on the Dashboard, in addition to the existing pet name, MRN, and species/sex information.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix: clicking a card on Dashboard should navigate to the corresponding case on the Cases page
Display owner name and presenting complaint on each Dashboard card
